plugin_desc: 通过 Pull 方式采集 etcd 关键监控指标，覆盖 Leader 状态、请求处理、网络通信、存储使用和 Watcher 负载等核心场景。
name: Etcd

metrics.name: etcd_server_has_leader_gauge
metrics.description: Whether the current etcd member can observe a leader. 1 means the cluster leadership is healthy, 0 means leader election is unavailable.

metrics.name: etcd_server_is_leader_gauge
metrics.description: Whether the current member is the leader.

metrics.name: etcd_server_leader_changes_seen_total_counter_rate
metrics.description: Rate of observed leader changes in the last 5 minutes. Frequent changes often indicate network jitter or cluster instability.

metrics.name: etcd_server_proposals_pending_gauge
metrics.description: Current number of proposals waiting to be committed.

metrics.name: etcd_server_proposals_failed_total_counter_rate
metrics.description: Rate of failed raft proposals in the last 5 minutes. Non-zero values indicate write path exceptions or consensus failures.

metrics.name: etcd_server_slow_apply_total_counter_rate
metrics.description: Rate of slow apply requests in the last 5 minutes.

metrics.name: etcd_server_read_indexes_failed_total_counter_rate
metrics.description: Rate of failed read index requests in the last 5 minutes.

metrics.name: etcd_server_slow_read_indexes_total_counter_rate
metrics.description: Rate of slow read index requests in the last 5 minutes.

metrics.name: etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_use_in_bytes_gauge
metrics.description: Actual etcd backend database space used by live data. Good baseline for storage growth tracking.

metrics.name: etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes_gauge
metrics.description: Total physically allocated backend database size.

metrics.name: etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes_gauge
metrics.description: Configured backend storage quota in bytes.

metrics.name: etcd_backend_quota_usage_percent
metrics.description: Ratio of logical backend usage to backend quota.

metrics.name: etcd_mvcc_db_open_read_transactions_gauge
metrics.description: Current number of open read transactions.

metrics.name: etcd_debugging_mvcc_keys_total_gauge
metrics.description: Current total number of keys in the store.

metrics.name: etcd_server_client_requests_total_counter_rate
metrics.description: Rate of all client requests handled by etcd in the last 5 minutes. It reflects the overall request pressure on the node.

metrics.name: etcd_network_active_peers_gauge
metrics.description: Current number of active peer connections.

metrics.name: etcd_server_heartbeat_send_failures_total_counter_rate
metrics.description: Rate of leader heartbeat send failures in the last 5 minutes.

metrics.name: etcd_network_client_grpc_received_bytes_total_counter_rate
metrics.description: Rate of bytes received from client gRPC requests in the last 5 minutes, reflecting inbound request traffic.

metrics.name: etcd_network_client_grpc_sent_bytes_total_counter_rate
metrics.description: Rate of bytes sent to client gRPC requests in the last 5 minutes, reflecting outbound response traffic.

metrics.name: etcd_network_peer_received_bytes_total_counter_rate
metrics.description: Rate of bytes received from peers in the last 5 minutes.

metrics.name: etcd_network_peer_sent_bytes_total_counter_rate
metrics.description: Rate of bytes sent to peers in the last 5 minutes.

metrics.name: etcd_network_peer_sent_failures_total_counter_rate
metrics.description: Rate of peer send failures in the last 5 minutes.

metrics.name: etcd_debugging_mvcc_watcher_total_gauge
metrics.description: Current number of watchers.

metrics.name: etcd_debugging_mvcc_watch_stream_total_gauge
metrics.description: Current number of watch streams.
